app.name: soft-ue-cli
app.one_liner: AI-native CLI and MCP server enabling LLM agents to control Unreal Engine 5 via live bridge or offline file parsing.

screens.name: Command Interface
screens.purpose: Provide unified access to 60+ UE5 automation tools via CLI or MCP server.

rust_commands.name: exec-console-command
rust_commands.purpose: Execute Unreal Engine console commands directly in PIE sessions.

rust_commands.name: inspect-customizable-object-graph
rust_commands.purpose: Inspect CustomizableObject graph structure for AI-driven asset analysis.

rust_commands.name: inspect-mutable-diagnostics
rust_commands.purpose: Provide structured diagnostics for Mutable system operations.

rust_commands.name: inspect-mutable-parameters
rust_commands.purpose: Expose Mutable parameter metadata for runtime configuration by AI agents.

rust_commands.name: validate-class-path
rust_commands.purpose: Verify that a soft class path resolves before attempting to spawn an actor.

mvp_plan: week 1: Ensure compatibility with UE 5.7 compilation
week 1: Restore and stabilize inspection commands for Mutable and CustomizableObject systems
week 1: Validate MCP server integration with Claude Desktop and Cursor
acceptance_tests: CLI exports inspect-customizable-object-graph, inspect-mutable-parameters, and inspect-mutable-diagnostics commands as documented
Commands requiring PIE auto-detect editor state and return structured errors when not available
LLM client receives correct setup instructions for autonomous plugin installation
Offline config parsing correctly diffs .ini and BuildConfiguration.xml layers
SoftUEBridge plugin compiles successfully on UE 5.7
